MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

  • Release Notes
Closed Caption

Closed captioning (CC), in which "closed" means it is hidden until selected. In contrast, open captioning means that the captions or subtitles are hard-coded to the visuals and visible to all viewers, and cannot be closed.

Capturing and Rendering Closed Caption

Magewell Pro Capture family cards with SDI connectivity support Closed Caption data. The capture device obtains, decodes and renders CC-related ANC data from the SDI signal according to the Closed Caption standard.

The related data structure and function definition files are as follows:

  1. mw_cc708_base_types.h
  2. mw_cc708_render_base_types.h
  3. mw_error_code.h
  4. mw_cc708_decoder.h
  5. mw_cc708_render.h

The related data structure and detailed function description files are as follows:

  1. Closed Caption Macros
  2. Closed Caption Structure
  3. Closed Caption Enumeration Types
  4. Closed Caption Decoder Functions
  5. Closed Caption Render Functions

SDKv3 provides not only the APIs, but also the DShow filters (Magewell CC708 Decoder) on how to capture, decode, and render the closed captions. You can refer to the following examples to learn how to use CC features with Magewell capture devices, or develop your own ways to render videos with CC.

  1. MWCCPlayer_DRLib C++
  2. MWCCPlayer_DShow C++
